summary: Iranian subsonic loitering air defense missiles, the Missile 358, equipped with compact turbojet engines and thermal imaging homing heads, have demonstrated effectiveness against Israeli Hermes-900 UAVs. Russian forces in Donetsk region reported a Ukrainian FPV drone strike on an occupier's bike, while another Russian drone was shot down by an FPV interceptor. ZALA Lancet operators, despite electronic warfare interference, successfully struck group targets using a single loitering munition. The Rubicon Center's air defense units intercepted over 1,500 fixed-wing UAVs, with 343 Leleka-100, 132 Fury, and 98 other models downed, and on March 6, 2026, destroyed 107 targets across Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman directions. On March 7, 2026, they destroyed 88 targets in similar operations. Ukraine's drone crews are struggling to meet the Defense Ministry's goal of 50,000 monthly enemy eliminations due to reduced Russian troop density within range.
